name: SNETsocket
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETsocket(stype As UByte) As Byte

Create a Spectranet socket and return its id (byte).

name: SNETbind
parameters: socket As UByte, port As UInteger
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETbind(socket, port) As Byte

Bind socket to port.

name: SNETlisten
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETlisten(socket) As Byte

Listen for incoming connections.

name: SNETaccept
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETaccept(socket) As Byte

Accept incoming connection on listening socket.

name: SNETconnect
parameters: socket As UByte, ip$, port As UInteger
doc:
Function SNETconnect(socket, ip$, port) As Byte

Connect socket to remote ip and port.

name: SNETclose
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETclose(socket) As Byte

Close a socket.

name: SNETrecv
parameters: socket As UByte, addr As UInteger, length As UInteger
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETrecv(socket, addr, length) As Byte

Receive data into memory address. Returns status/bytes.

name: SNETsend
parameters: socket As UByte, addr As UInteger, length As UInteger
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETsend(socket, addr, length) As Byte

Send data from memory address.

name: SNETpollfd
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETpollfd(socket) As UByte

Poll socket file descriptor.

name: SNETpeekUinteger
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETpeekUinteger(addr as UInteger) As UInteger

Read a 16-bit value from paged memory safely.

name: SNETmount
parameters: mpoint as UByte, proto$, host$, source$, userid$, passwd$
doc:
Function SNETmount(mpoint, proto$, host$, source$, userid$, passwd$) As Integer

Mount a remote filesystem; returns session number.

name: SNETcurrMPoint
doc:
Function SNETcurrMPoint() As Byte

Return current mount point.

name: SNETsetmountpt
doc:
Sub FASTCALL SNETsetmountpt(mpoint)

Change current mount point.

name: SNETumount
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETumount(mpoint) As UInteger

Unmount a previously mounted filesystem.

name: SNETopen
parameters: mpoint as UByte, fname$, flags as UInteger, chmod as UInteger
doc:
Function SNETopen(mpoint, fname$, flags, chmod) As Byte

Open a remote file; returns handle or -1 on error.

name: SNETfread
parameters: fhandle as UByte, addr as UInteger, size as UInteger
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETfread(fhandle, addr, size) As UInteger

Read file content into memory; returns bytes read.

name: SNETfwrite
parameters: fhandle as UByte, addr as UInteger, size as UInteger
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETfwrite(fhandle, addr, size) As UInteger

Write memory content to file; returns bytes written.

name: SNETfopen
doc:
Function SNETfopen(mpoint, fname$, mode$) As Byte

Convenience fopen-like wrapper returning file handle.

name: SNETfclose
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETfclose(fhandle) As Byte

Close remote file; returns 0 on success.

name: SNETfseek
parameters: fhandle as UByte, op as UByte, pos as ULong
doc:
Function FASTCALL SNETfseek(fhandle, op, pos) As Byte

Change file read/write position.

name: SNETunlink
doc:
Function SNETunlink(fname$) As Byte

Delete a remote file; returns 0 on success.
